mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_application WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_application ( employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, start_period, end_period, days, reason, handover_to, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{startPeriod}, #{endPeriod}, #{days}, #{reason}, #{handoverTo}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_application SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT la.leave_type AS leaveType, COALESCE(SUM(la.days), 0) AS totalDays, COUNT(*) AS count FROM leave_application la JOIN employee e ON la.employee_id = e.id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND la.status = 2 AND la.start_date <= #{monthEnd} AND la.end_date >= #{monthStart} GROUP BY la.leave_type
